title: DAOGE host_native_results
description: Minimal result contract for importing host-native image generation outputs back into DAOGE.

field_notes.index: String or number. Prefer stable numbering like 001, 002.
field_notes.title: Human-readable result title.
field_notes.output: Absolute image path, or path relative to the host_native_results.json directory. Required for success and needs_review.
field_notes.scene: Optional scene summary for review boards.
field_notes.composition: Optional composition summary for review boards.
field_notes.textPolicy: Optional typography-space or copy-safe policy note.
